creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
Mhm this is even weirder.
It seems that the "focus" stays on the first X app that I start.
So if I open 2 emacs each on a different workspace when I scroll on the first one I've open it worked, if I scrolled on the second one it doesn't works but the first one scrolled.
Also I've reverted the recent commits in x11/xwayland-devel and this doesn't changes a thing, I'm back at 21.0.99.1.111 now. So this could be wlroots related.
